instruction: This device tablet icon needs a green checkmark added back in the top-right (polyline (88,24)→(98,34)→(114,18), stroke #22c55e, stroke-width 3, no fill).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/device-tablet.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10.5 19.5h3m-6.75 2.25h10.5a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25-2.25v-15a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25H6.75A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 4.5 4.5v15a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/device-tablet.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M10.5 19.5h3m-6.75 2.25h10.5a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25-2.25v-15a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25H6.75A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 4.5 4.5v15a2.25 2.25 0 0 0 2.25 2.25Z"/></g>
  <polyline id="check" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="3" fill="none" points="88,24 98,34 114,18" />
</svg>
